query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_opportunities,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(arbitragePercentage AS DECIMAL(5,4))), 4) as avg_arbitrage_percentage,
  ROUND(MAX(CAST(arbitragePercentage AS DECIMAL(5,4))), 4) as max_arbitrage_percentage,
  ROUND(MIN(CAST(arbitragePercentage AS DECIMAL(5,4))), 4) as min_arbitrage_percentage,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN isActive = 1 THEN 1 END) as active_opportunities,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN isActive = 0 THEN 1 END) as inactive_opportunities,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(profitPercentage AS DECIMAL(5,4))), 4) as avg_profit_percentage
FROM arbitrage_opportunities;

SELECT 
  sport,
  COUNT(*) as opportunities_count,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(arbitragePercentage AS DECIMAL(5,4))), 4) as avg_edge,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN isActive = 1 THEN 1 END) as active_count
FROM arbitrage_opportunities
GROUP BY sport
ORDER BY opportunities_count DESC;

SELECT 
  DATE(createdAt) as date,
  COUNT(*) as opportunities_found,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(arbitragePercentage AS DECIMAL(5,4))), 4) as avg_edge,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN isActive = 1 THEN 1 END) as active_count
FROM arbitrage_opportunities
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt)
ORDER BY date DESC;

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_trades,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN executedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as executed_trades,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN resultA = 'won' OR resultB = 'won' THEN 1 END) as winning_trades,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(totalWinnings AS DECIMAL(10,2))), 2) as avg_winnings
FROM user_arbitrage_trades;

  COUNT(CASE WHEN isActive = 1 THEN 1 END) as active_count

GROUP BY DATE(createdAt)
ORDER BY date DESC;

  COUNT(CASE WHEN executedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as executed_trades,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN resultA = 'won' OR resultB = 'won' THEN 1 END) as winning_trades,
